title: the_better_allay_piglin_allay
description: These is a new allay named bamboo allay. This mod was made using MCreator. Please subscribe me on Bilibili.
body:
——Unless there is a vicious BUG,Otherwise, it will not be updated (if there is a BUG,Please chat with the author in the private message interface of Bilibili).

This mod adds a creature: piglin allay.

Use gold ingot to her and right hit her you can get some items from bastion remnant or piglin,after that,you can't right hit her to get items again in 10min.

If you want to get items angin,you don't wait of her,just put 8 gold ingot and a netherrack on craftingtable to craft a speical item to effect clear piglin allay to get items again.

If you pay a gold block,she will copy her.If you want to do that again ,you will wait for her for 10min(if you don't cheat or have not other mods' items,you must wait for her for 10 min).

Can you subscribe me on Bilibili? https://space.bilibili.com/417059009?spm_id_from=333.337.0.0

Questions about the use of mod content: I don't know the specifics of the protocol, so feel free to use the mod models in the case of non-commercial, tagging my name, and of course, I treat them as my children, and I don't want you to hurt them
